CustomField.formula: Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Posted_By__r.FirstName + " "+ Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Posted_By__r.LastName + IF( Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Contact__c != Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Posted_By__c , " on behalf of " + Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Contact__r.FirstName + " " + Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Contact__r.LastName, "")
CustomField.label: Posting Contact
